title.ko: 전기에 의한 디지털 데이터처리 (특정계산모델방식의 컴퓨터시스템 G06N)
title.en: ELECTRIC DIGITAL DATA PROCESSING (computer systems based on specific computational models G06N)

definition.ko: 데이터 처리 G06F7/00, G06F15/00 ~ G06F17/00 입력, 출력; 기능적 요소 간 상호연결 G06F3/00; G06F13/00 주소지정 또는 할당 G06F12/00 전환; 프로그램 제어; 오류 감지, 감시 G06F5/00; G06F9/00; G06F11/00 세부 사항 G06F1/00 보안 구성 G06F21/00 컴퓨터 보조 설계[CAD] G06F30/00 자연어 데이터의 취급 G06F40/00

title.ko: 그룹 G06F3/00-G06F13/00 및 G06F21/00에 포함되지 않는 세부 (범용 프로그램 컴퓨터의 아키텍처 G06F15/76)
title.en: Details not covered by groups G06F0003000000-G06F0013000000 and G06F0021000000 (architectures of general purpose stored program computers G06F0015760000)

title.en: Digital function generators
for functions having two-valued amplitude, e.g. Walsh functions

title.en: working, at least partly, by table look-up (G06F0001025000 takes precedence)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에 분류되기 위해서는 테이블은 단순한 계수가 아니라 소망의 함수 또는 중간 함수의 함수치를 포함하여야 한다.

title.en: Reduction of table size
Generating or distributing clock signals or signals derived directly therefrom
Clock generators producing several clock signals
Clock generators with changeable or programmable clock frequency
Distribution of clock signals
Synchronisation of different clock signals
Time supervision arrangements, e.g. real time clock
Constructional details or arrangements
Packaging or power distribution
Internal mounting support structures, e.g. for supporting printed circuit boards
Mounting of motherboards
Mounting of expansion boards
Securing of expansion boards in correspondence to slots provided at the computer enclosure
Mounting of fixed or removable disk drives
Mounting of power supply units
Cooling means
Means for limiting or controlling the pin/gate ratio
Resetting means

title.ko: 전력공급수단, 예. 전원의 안정화(메모리를 위한 것 G11C)
title.en: Power supply means, e.g. regulation thereof (for memories G11C)
Supervision thereof, e.g. detecting power-supply failure by out of limits supervision

title.ko: 전력공급불량 또는 중단시에 작동하는 수단. 예. 전원공급변동 (리셋만을 위한 것 G06F1/24)
title.en: Means for acting in the event of power-supply failure or interruption, e.g. power-supply fluctuations  (for resetting only G06F0001240000)
Means for saving power
Power management, i.e. event-based initiation of a power-saving mode
Monitoring of events, devices or parameters that trigger a change in power modality
Monitoring remote activity, e.g. over telephone lines or network connections
Monitoring battery levels, e.g. power saving mode being initiated when battery voltage goes below a certain level
Monitoring of peripheral devices
of display devices
of disk drive devices
of memory devices
Monitoring task completion, e.g. by use of idle timers, stop commands or wait commands
Monitoring the presence, absence or movement of users
Power saving characterised by the action undertaken
by disabling clock generation or distribution
by lowering clock frequency
by software initiated power-off
by switching off individual functional units in the computer system
by task scheduling
by switching to a less power-consuming processor, e.g. sub-CPU
by lowering the supply or operating voltage

title.ko: 처리할 데이터를 컴퓨터로 처리할 수 있는 형식으로 전송하기 위한 입력 장치; 처리 유닛에서 출력 유닛로 데이터를 전송하기 위한 출력 장치, 예. 인터페이스 장치
title.en: Input arrangements for transferring data to be processed into a form capable of being handled by the computer; Output arrangements for transferring data from processing unit to output unit, e.g. interface arrangements

title.ko: 사용자와 컴퓨터의 상호작용을 위한 입력장치 또는 입력과 출력이 결합한 장치(G06F 3/16이 우선)
title.en: Input arrangements or combined input and output arrangements for interaction between user and computer (G06F0003160000 takes precedence)
Input arrangements using manually operated switches, e.g. using keyboards or dials
Arrangements for converting discrete items of information into a coded form, e.g. arrangements for interpreting keyboard generated codes as alphanumeric codes, operand codes or instruction codes
for insertion of the decimal point

title.ko: 구성부재의 위치 또는 변위를 부호화된 형태로 변환하기 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for converting the position or the displacement of a member into a coded form

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 상반되는 지시가 없는 한, 최초개소 우선규칙이 적용되며, 즉. 각 계층적 레벨에서, 최초의 적절한 개소에 분류한다. . .

title.ko: 사용자에 의해 변위 또는 위치가 결정되는 포인팅 디바이스; 그 부속품(변환 수단에 의해 특정되는 디지타이저 G06F 3/041)
title.en: Pointing devices displaced or positioned by the user; Accessories therefor (digitisers characterised by the transducing means G06F0003041000)
with detection of limited linear or angular displacement of an operating part of the device from a neutral position, e.g. isotonic or isometric joysticks

title.ko: 3차원 [3D] 공간에서 방치의 방향이나 자유로운 움직임을 감지하는 것, 예. 3D 마우스, 자이로스코프, 가속도계 또는 기울기 센서를 사용하는 6-DOF [6 자유도] 포인터
title.en: with detection of the device orientation or free movement in a three-dimensional [3D] space, e.g. 3D mice, 6-DOF [six degrees of freedom] pointers using gyroscopes, accelerometers or tilt-sensors
with detection of two-dimensional [2D] relative movements between the device, or an operating part thereof, and a plane or surface, e.g. 2D mice, trackballs, pens or pucks
with detection of one-dimensional [1D] translations or rotations of an operating part of the device, e.g. scroll wheels, sliders, knobs, rollers or belts
using the raster scan of a cathode-ray tube [CRT] for detecting the position of the member, e.g. light pens cooperating with CRT monitors
Control and interface arrangements therefor, e.g. drivers or device-embedded control circuitry
Accessories therefor, e.g. mouse pads
Digitisers, e.g. for touch screens or touch pads, characterised by the transducing means
by opto-electronic means
using propagating acoustic waves
by capacitive means
using resistive elements, e.g. a single continuous surface or two parallel surfaces put in contact
by electromagnetic means
using sets of wires, e.g. crossed wires

title.ko: 그래픽 유저 인터페이스에 기반한 상호작용 기술 [GUI]
title.en: Interaction techniques based on graphical user interfaces [GUI]

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 사용자가 표시된 데이터와 상호 작용할 수 있는 방식에 초점이 맞춰지는 주제를 다룹니다. 특정 소프트웨어 애플리케이션 또는 특정 기능과 관련된 데이터를 처리 할 수있는 특정 장치의 공개와 관련하여 표준 GUI가 존재하는 것만은 일반적으로 해당 소프트웨어 애플리케이션 또는 특정 장치와 관련된 적절한 하위 클래스로 분류되어야 합니다.

title.ko: 표시된 상호작용 객체 또는 은유-기반 환경의 특정 속성을 기반으로 하는 것, 예. 윈도우 또는 아이콘과 같은 바탕화면 요소와의 상호작용, 또는 커서의 변화하는 동작 또는 모양에 의해 지원되는 것
title.en: based on specific properties of the displayed interaction object or a metaphor-based environment, e.g. interaction with desktop elements like windows or icons, or assisted by a cursor's changing behaviour or appearance
Interaction techniques based on cursor appearance or behaviour, e.g. being affected by the presence of displayed objects
Interaction with a metaphor-based environment or interaction object displayed as three-dimensional [3D], e.g. changing the user viewpoint with respect to the environment or object

title.ko: 아이콘을 사용 (아이콘 기호를 사용한 그래픽 또는 시각적 프로그래밍 G06F8/34)
title.en: using icons (graphical or visual programming using iconic symbols G06F0008340000)
Interaction with lists of selectable items, e.g. menus
Interaction with page-structured environments, e.g. book metaphor

title.ko: 특정 기능 또는 작동의 제어를 위한, 예. 객체, 이미지 또는 표시된 텍스트 요소를 선택하거나 조작하는 것, 파라미터 값을 설정하거나 범위를 선택하는 것
title.en: for the control of specific functions or operations, e.g. selecting or manipulating an object, an image or a displayed text element, setting a parameter value or selecting a range

title.ko: 표시된 객체 또는 표시된 텍스트 요소의 선택 (G06F3/0482가 우선)
title.en: Selection of displayed objects or displayed text elements (G06F0003048200 takes precedence)
for image manipulation, e.g. dragging, rotation, expansion or change of colour
Interaction techniques to control parameter settings, e.g. interaction with sliders or dials
Scrolling or panning
Interaction with scrollbars
Drag-and-drop

title.ko: 입력 장치에 의해 제공되는 특정 기능을 사용, 예. 이중 감지 장치가 있는 마우스의 회전에 의해 제어되는 기능, 또는 입력 장치의 특성의 것, 예. 디지타이저에 의해 감지된 압력을 기반으로 한 탭 제스처
title.en: using specific features provided by the input device, e.g. functions controlled by the rotation of a mouse with dual sensing arrangements, or of the nature of the input device, e.g. tap gestures based on pressure sensed by a digitiser
using a touch-screen or digitiser, e.g. input of commands through traced gestures
for inputting data by handwriting, e.g. gesture or text
by partitioning the display area of the touch-screen or the surface of the digitising tablet into independently controllable areas, e.g. virtual keyboards or menus

title.ko: 전용의 키보드 키 또는 그것의 조합을 사용
title.en: using dedicated keyboard keys or combinations thereof

title.ko: 하나의 개별 위치에서 다른 위치로 커서 변위를 나타내는 코드에 기초하여 커서 위치를 제어하기 위한 장치, 예. 다른 방향과 연결된 커서 제어 키를 사용하는 것 또는 탭 키를 사용하는 것 (좌표 신호를 기반으로 커서 위치를 제어하기 위한 장치 G06F3/038)
title.en: Arrangements for controlling cursor position based on codes indicative of cursor displacements from one discrete location to another, e.g. using cursor control keys associated to different directions or using the tab key (arrangements for controlling cursor position based on coordinate signals G06F0003038000)
Guidance during keyboard input operation, e.g. prompting
Digital input using the sampling of an analogue quantity at regular intervals of time
Digital input from, or digital output to, record carriers
from or to individual record carriers, e.g. punched card
Digital output to typewriters
Digital output to print unit
Digital output to plotter
Digital output to display device
using display panels
using cathode-ray tubes

title.en: Sound input; Sound output  (speech processing G10L)
Digital input from automatic curve follower
Methods or arrangements for data conversion without changing the order or content of the data handled
for shifting, e.g. justifying, scaling, normalising
for changing the speed of data flow, i.e. speed regularising
having a sequence of storage locations, the intermediate ones not being accessible for either enqueue or dequeue operations, e.g. using a shift register
having a sequence of storage locations each being individually accessible for both enqueue and dequeue operations, e.g. using random access memory
Means for monitoring the fill level; Means for resolving contention, i.e. conflicts between simultaneous enqueue and dequeue operations
for overflow or underflow handling, e.g. full or empty flags
Multiplexed systems, i.e. using two or more similar devices which are alternately accessed for enqueue and dequeue operations, e.g. ping-pong buffers

title.ko: 처리된 데이터의 순서 또는 내용에 따라 작동하여 데이터를 처리하기 위한 방법 또는 장치 (논리 회로 H03K19/00)
title.en: Methods or arrangements for processing data by operating upon the order or content of the data handled (logic circuits H03K0019000000)

title.ko: 디지털 값의 비교(G06F 7/06, G06F 7/38 우선)
title.en: Comparing digital values (G06F0007060000, G06F0007380000 take precedence)
Identity comparison, i.e. for like or unlike values

title.ko: 각각의 기록 매체상에 데이터를 분류, 선별, 조합 또는 비교하기 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for sorting, selecting, merging, or comparing data on individual record carriers

title.ko: 정렬, 즉. 기록 매체가 갖고 있는 정보중 적어도 일부의 분류에 따라 숫자 또는 기타 정렬된 순서로 그룹화하는 것 (2 이상의 캐리어 세트를 순서대로 병합하는 것 G06F7/16)
title.en: Sorting, i.e. grouping record carriers in numerical or other ordered sequence according to the classification of at least some of the information they carry (by merging two or more sets of carriers in ordered sequence G06F0007160000)
Selecting, i.e. obtaining data of one kind from those record carriers which are identifiable by data of a second kind from a mass of ordered or randomly-distributed record carriers
with provision for printing-out a list of selected items
Merging, i.e. combining at least two sets of record carriers each arranged in the same ordered sequence to produce a single set having the same ordered sequence
Combined merging and sorting
Comparing separate sets of record carriers arranged in the same sequence to determine whether at least some of the data in one set is identical with that in the other set or sets

title.ko: 예를 들어 테이프, 드럼, 디스크와 같은 연속적 기록매체 상의 데이터를 분류 또는 조합하는 장치
title.en: Arrangements for sorting or merging computer data on continuous record carriers, e.g. tape, drum, disc

title.ko: 분류, 1이상의 기록매체로부터 데이터를 인출하여 번호순 또는 다른 일정한 순서로 그 데이터를 다시 배열하고 나서 원래의 기록매체나 다른 기록매체 혹은 기록매체들의 조에 그 분류된 데이터를 재기록 하는 것(G06F 7/36이 우선)
title.en: Sorting, i.e. extracting data from one or more carriers, re-arranging the data in numerical or other ordered sequence, and re-recording the sorted data on the original carrier or on a different carrier or set of carriers (G06F0007360000 takes precedence)
the sorted data being recorded on the original record carrier within the same space in which the data had been recorded prior to their sorting, without using intermediate storage

title.ko: 조합, 즉 적어도 2의 기록매체상에 일정순서로 삽입된 데이터를 조합하여 원래데이터의 전부를 순서대로 보존하는 1의 기록매체나 조로 된 기록매체를 만드는 것 (G06F7/36이 우선)
title.en: Merging, i.e. combining data contained in ordered sequence on at least two record carriers to produce a single carrier or set of carriers having all the original data in the ordered sequence (G06F0007360000 takes precedence)
Combined merging and sorting

title.ko: 자리잡기 기수법을 사용하여 계산을 하기 위한 방법 또는 장치, 예. 2진, 3진, 10진법을 사용하는 것
title.en: Methods or arrangements for performing computations using exclusively denominational number representation, e.g. using binary, ternary, decimal representation

title.ko: 접점개폐소자, 예. 전자 계전기를 사용하는 것(G06F 7/46이 우선)
title.en: using contact-making devices, e.g. electromagnetic relay (G06F0007460000 takes precedence)
Adding; Subtracting
Multiplying; Dividing
using electromechanical counter-type accumulators

title.ko: 무접점소자, 예. 진공관, 고체소자를 사용하는 것 소자를 특정하지 아니하고 사용하는 것
title.en: using non-contact-making devices, e.g. tube, solid state device; using unspecified devices
Computations with numbers represented by a non-linear combination of denominational numbers, e.g. rational numbers, logarithmic number system or floating-point numbers
Adding; Subtracting
Multiplying; Dividing
Computations with a radix, other than binary, 8, 16 or decimal, e.g. ternary, negative or imaginary radices, mixed radix
Computations with decimal numbers
using a binary weighted representation within each denomination
the representation being the natural binary coded representation, i.e. 8421-code
Adding; Subtracting
in digit-serial fashion, i.e. having a single digit-handling circuit treating all denominations after each other
Multiplying; Dividing
using counter-type accumulators
Denomination or exception handling, e.g. rounding or overflow
Adding; Subtracting (G06F0007483000-G06F0007491000, G06F0007544000-G06F0007556000 take precedence)
Half or full adders, i.e. basic adder cells for one denomination
Half adders; Full adders consisting of two cascaded half adders
using carry switching, i.e. the incoming carry being connected directly, or only via an inverter, to the carry output under control of a carry propagate signal
in bit-serial fashion, i.e. having a single digit-handling circuit treating all denominations after each other
in bit-parallel fashion, i.e. having a different digit-handling circuit for each denomination
with simultaneous carry generation for, or propagation over, two or more stages
using selection between two conditionally calculated carry or sum values
using carry look-ahead circuits
for multiple operands, e.g. digital integrators
Multiplying; Dividing (G06F0007483000-G06F0007491000, G06F0007544000-G06F0007556000 take precedence)

title.ko: 곱셈만
title.en: Multiplying only

title.ko: 직렬-직렬 연산 형식인 것, 즉, 양쪽 모두의 오퍼랜드가 직렬로 입력되는 것(G06F 7/533이 우선)
title.en: in serial-serial fashion, i.e. both operands being entered serially (G06F0007533000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 직렬-병렬 연산 형식인 것, 즉, 한편의 오퍼랜드가 직렬로 입력되며 그리고 다른 한편의 오퍼랜드가 병렬로 입력되는 것(G06F 7/533이 우선)
title.en: in serial-parallel fashion, i.e. one operand being entered serially and the other in parallel (G06F0007533000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 병렬-병렬 연산 형식인 것, 즉, 양쪽 모두의 오퍼랜드가 병렬로 입력되는 것(G06F 7/533이 우선)
title.en: in parallel-parallel fashion, i.e. both operands being entered in parallel (G06F0007533000 takes precedence)
Reduction of the number of iteration steps or stages, e.g. using the Booth algorithm, log-sum, odd-even
Dividing only
Reduction of the number of iteration steps or stages, e.g. using the Sweeny-Robertson-Tocher [SRT] algorithm
for evaluating functions by calculation
Trigonometric functions; Co-ordinate transformations
Powers or roots
Logarithmic or exponential functions

title.ko: 산술 논리 연산 장치[ALU]. 즉, 그룹 G06F7/483에서 G06F7/556에 포함되는 2이상의 연산을 실행하는 장치 또는 논리 연산을 실행하는 장치
title.en: Arithmetic logic units [ALU], i.e. arrangements or devices for performing two or more of the operations covered by groups G06F0007483000-G06F0007556000 or for performing logical operations
Basic arithmetic logic units, i.e. devices selectable to perform either addition, subtraction or one of several logical operations, using, at least partially, the same circuitry
Random or pseudo-random number generators

title.ko: 디지털인 자리잡기 아닌 기수법, 즉 기수를 사용하지 않는 수 표현을 써서 계산을 하기 위한 방법 또는 장치 자리잡기 기수법과 자리잡기 아닌 기수법의 조합된 것을 쓰는 계산장치
title.en: Methods or arrangements for performing computations using a digital non-denominational number representation, i.e. number representation without radix; Computing devices using combinations of denominational and non-denominational quantity representations
Performing operations exclusively by counting total number of pulses

title.ko: 디지털 미분 해석기, 즉 증분을 표시하는 펄스를 써서 미분, 적분 혹은 미분 또는 적분방정식을 풀기 위한 계산장치 차분방정식을 풀기 위한 기타의 증분계산기 (G06F7/70이 우선; 하이브리드 계산기술을 사용한 미분 해석기 G06J1/02)
title.en: Digital differential analysers, i.e. computing devices for differentiation, integration or solving differential or integral equations, using pulses representing increments; Other incremental computing devices for solving difference equations (G06F0007700000 takes precedence;differential analysers using hybrid computing techniques G06J0001020000)
wherein pulses represent unitary increments only

title.ko: 펄스율 승산기 또는 제산기를 사용하는 것(G06F 7/70이 우선)
title.en: using pulse rate multipliers or dividers (G06F0007700000 takes precedence)
using stochastic pulse trains, i.e. randomly occurring pulses the average pulse rates of which represent numbers
using residue arithmetic
Selecting or encoding within a word the position of one or more bits having a specified value, e.g. most or least significant one or zero detection, priority encoders
